subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I call upon Thee at this moment when the clouds of Thy trials have been lifted up and the mists of Thy decree have risen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی انادیک حینئذ حین الذی استرفعت سحاب بلائک و غمام قضائک و
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God
